pageTitle: Wallet Lab | Get Started with Web3
pageDesc: A learner-safe wallet interoperability lab scaffold for EIP-6963, network switching, and message signing.
heading: Wallet Interoperability Lab
subheading: A focused lab surface for wallet discovery, network context, and message signing. The first slice is intentionally static while the wallet stack is reviewed.
statusBody: Scaffold ready. Wallet dependencies are not installed yet, so no wallet connection, signing, transaction, or authentication flow runs on this page today.
scopeNetwork: Show account, chain name, and chain ID
scopeSwitch: Switch between an approved set of networks
scopeSign: Sign one educational message and inspect the result locally
privacyBody: The lab must never send raw wallet addresses, signatures, signed messages, provider objects, or transaction payloads to analytics.
nextBody: Add route tests and keep the page dependency-free. Install wagmi, viem, RainbowKit, or Reown AppKit only in the follow-up implementation PR.
